expectations.text: behavioral_check: Names destructive_operations.md as the first reference (merge_methods.md acceptable as the second stop for the merge-specific classmethod-discard mechanics)
behavioral_check: Mentions inspect-before-destroy as the operative pattern; bonus credit for naming the classmethod-discard merge gotcha
expectations.evidence: Step 1 enumerates 'restrict before deleting, preview the cascade with .delete(safemode=True), confirm row count'. Doesn't name the classmethod-discard gotcha specifically (no bonus credit) but covers the inspect-before-destroy pattern adequately.
